title: vulpia microstachys
intro: Vulpia microstachys, also known as slender hairgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Vulpia microstachys include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Vulpia microstachys are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
